app.browserDevPreview: Browser dev preview (mock Electron API). Use DevTools for styling; run

filesystem.title: Local file system
filesystem.openVsCodeFailed: VS Code not found. Configure or detect the path in Settings.
filesystem.openCursorFailed: Cursor not found. Configure or detect the path in Settings.

titleBar.searchHint: Search within the active terminal output. Enter: next, Shift+Enter: previous.
titleBar.snapHint: Hover to choose a snap layout; click to snap the window

screenshot.selectHint: Click and drag to start capture (Esc to close)

aiSidebar.title: AI Assistant
aiSidebar.welcome: How can I help you today?
aiSidebar.welcomeNoKey: Configure an API key under Settings → Experimental → AI features.
aiSidebar.configureKey: Configure your OpenAI API key in Settings → Experimental first

focus.label: Focus
focus.description: Sidebar collapsed by default for terminal focus

minimal.label: Minimal
minimal.description: No sidebar; terminal icon tabs under the title bar

minimal.label: Minimal
minimal.description: Warm neutral grays, hairline borders, flat cards, restrained typography

niozy.label: NioZy
niozy.description: Original blue/cyan accents, card shadows, and colorful status tags

windowsClassic.label: Windows Classic
windowsClassic.description: Windows XP Luna nostalgia: blue title bar, 3D borders, Tahoma sizing, sunken panels

waFu.description: Japanese wa-fu: washi warm ivory, sakura pink accents, indigo and matcha presets, soft borders

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: UI style, theme, layout, language, accent color, and global font size
appearance.showAppTitleDesc: When off, the title bar shows only the icon, not the NioZy name
appearance.enableDialogAnimationsDesc: When on, dialogs (including image preview) fade in from below and fade out downward

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.description: Color scheme, font, cursor, and renderer
terminal.cursorBlinkDesc: When off, the cursor stays still
terminal.rendererDesc: xterm uses DOM by default; addon-canvas and addon-webgl enable Canvas and WebGL rendering.
terminal.rendererWtermDesc: Wterm is active and only supports DOM rendering. Switch back to Xterm for DOM, Canvas, or WebGL.
terminal.scrollbackDesc: Number of lines kept for scroll-up history (xterm scrollback)
terminal.rightClickCopyPasteDesc: Copy when text is selected; paste when nothing is selected
terminal.backgroundDesc: Set a local image as the terminal background. The file is stored as bg.<ext> in the background folder under your NioZy config directory.
terminal.backgroundPickNotImage: Please choose a valid image file

ssh.title: SSH
ssh.description: Disconnect alerts, SCP file transfer, and scp.exe detection
ssh.alertOnDisconnectDesc: When enabled, background (non-active) SSH terminal tabs show a notification when the session ends
ssh.scpTransferEnabledDesc: Adds Open transfer in the SSH tab context menu to upload/download files via scp
ssh.checkScpDesc: Verify scp.exe is available on PATH (OpenSSH client)
ssh.scpNotFound: scp.exe not found on PATH. Install Windows OpenSSH Client or Git for Windows.

shell.title: SHELL
shell.description: Terminal shell output and interaction (emoji, link highlight, and open)
shell.emojiNativeRenderingDesc: Uses the Unicode 11 width table so emoji and wide characters render correctly in the terminal
shell.highlightLinksDesc: Highlight http and https URLs in terminal output
shell.clickToOpenLinksDesc: Open a link in the default browser when you click it with the mouse
shell.shiftEnterNewlineDesc: When enabled, Shift+Enter or Ctrl+Enter inserts a newline in interactive CLIs (e.g. Claude, Cursor agent); Enter sends the message. Clicks on output no longer move the cursor to the end of the screen. In TUIs, hold Shift and drag with the left button to select; release to copy
shell.showTerminalIndexDesc: When enabled, shows an index number to the left of each terminal tab name in the sidebar
shell.enableTabDragDesc: When enabled, long-press a sidebar terminal tab for 2 seconds to enter drag mode and reorder tabs vertically

preview.title: Preview
preview.description: Preview files and links from terminal output (Ctrl+click)
preview.imagePreviewDesc: Detect common image extensions; hover shows Ctrl+click hint; local shell only (not SSH)
preview.chartPreviewDesc: Detect .docx, .xlsx, .csv, .txt, .md, .pdf; render docx/xlsx/pdf inline, others as text
preview.linkPreviewDesc: Ctrl+click opens URL in an in-app tab (uses proxy from System settings); normal click still uses the system browser
preview.anyFilePreviewDesc: Preview other extensions as text, up to the first 1 MB
preview.ctrlClickHint: Hold Ctrl and left-click to preview
preview.sshNotSupported: File preview is not supported on SSH terminals
preview.truncatedNotice: Large file — showing first 1 MB only
preview.pageLoadFailedHint: Check your network connection, proxy settings, or whether the URL is correct.
preview.webviewHeadersDesc: Attach HTTP headers to every link-preview WebView request (rows with an empty name are ignored)
preview.webviewBrowsingDataDesc: Clear cache, cookies, local storage, and HTTP auth cache for link-preview WebViews
preview.webviewClearConfirmDesc: This removes cookies, cache, and local storage for link preview. Reopen or refresh open preview tabs for the change to take effect.
preview.webviewClearFailed: Failed to clear WebView browsing data
preview.webviewClearBrowserOnly: Clearing WebView data is only available in the desktop app
preview.documentRenderModeDesc: Engine for docx, xlsx, and csv previews. Mammoth converts to HTML; js-preview keeps richer layout.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: Memory and background resource tuning for inactive terminal tabs
performance.inactiveTabOptimizationDesc: When enabled, inactive tabs with no interaction for 5 minutes unmount the terminal view and free xterm/wterm memory. PTY sessions stay connected; switching back rebuilds the view and replays buffered output
performance.inactiveTabSleepDesc: When enabled, turns on Chromium background throttling and pauses live PTY streaming for inactive tabs to reduce usage. Switching back resumes streaming (restart the app for full command-line throttling effect)
performance.superPowerSavingDesc: Keeps only the active tab's terminal mounted; Xterm temporarily uses DOM rendering. Inactive tabs end their PTY and unmount the view; switching back respawns from saved options (local shell sessions restart; SSH reconnects)

filesystem.title: File system
filesystem.description: Local file tree preview, context menu open actions, and external programs
filesystem.imagePreviewDesc: When enabled, click or double-click an image file to preview it in a dialog
filesystem.openWithVsCodeDesc: Show this item in the file tree context menu (on by default)
filesystem.openWithCursorDesc: Show this item in the file tree context menu (on by default)
filesystem.programPathPlaceholder: Leave empty to auto-detect, or set the full path to code.exe / Cursor.exe
filesystem.customOpenersDesc: Set a label and executable path; entries appear in the file tree context menu
filesystem.customNotFound: No executable at the given path

statistics.title: Usage statistics
statistics.description: Locally records app usage time and terminal activity; data is stored in statistic.json
statistics.enabledDesc: Records usage duration, terminal tab open/close counts, and commands entered on this device
statistics.showStatusBarDesc: Shows a statistics button to the left of Search; click to view stats
statistics.clearConfirmDesc: This removes lifetime and today’s statistics. This cannot be undone.

system.title: System
system.launchOnStartupDesc: Start NioZy when you sign in to Windows
system.minimizeToTrayDesc: Hide to the system tray when clicking the close button
system.reloadEnvironmentDesc: Pulls the latest PATH and other variables from the OS without restarting NioZy. Applies only to new terminals; reopen tabs or refresh PATH inside existing shells.
system.settingsBackupDesc: Export all current settings (including custom connections) as JSON, or import from a JSON file to replace the current configuration. Vault variables are not included in exports.
system.updateAvailableDesc: You are on {{current}}. Version {{latest}} is available. Download and install now?
system.aboutDesc: Multi-terminal manager — Electron, React, xterm.js, and Windows ConPTY.

experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.description: Unstable features that may change or be removed
experimental.terminalEmulatorDesc: Choose the frontend terminal implementation. Wterm uses WASM/DOM rendering (experimental). Restart open terminals after switching.

ai.title: AI features
ai.description: Configure the AI chat sidebar and model provider. Runtime listens on 127.0.0.1 only. API keys may be plain text or vault references like ${OPENAI_API_KEY} (secret variables recommended).
ai.sidebarEnabledDesc: Show the AI chat sidebar on the right. Sending messages requires an API key for the selected provider (optional for local Ollama).
ai.attachmentsEnabledDesc: When on, the + button in the AI sidebar lets you add local images or files (drag-and-drop and paste also work). Requires a vision or multimodal model.
ai.sidebarWidthDesc: Width of the AI chat sidebar. Takes effect immediately.
ai.runtimePortDesc: Local Copilot Runtime listen port on 127.0.0.1 (default 6173). Reconnect the AI sidebar after changing.
ai.providerDesc: Choose which AI service to connect to.
ai.modelDesc: Pick a common model or enter a custom model name below (must match your API).
ai.modelCustomPlaceholder: Custom model name, e.g. qwen-plus or endpoint id
ai.baseUrlDesc: API base URL. Defaults are filled when switching providers; edit if needed.
ai.apiKeyDesc: API key for the provider, or ${VAR} from Settings → Vault (use the database icon to insert). Resolved when Copilot Runtime starts.
ai.apiKeyOptionalDesc: Local Ollama usually does not need an API key.

experimental.ghosttyCoreEnabledDesc: Use the libghostty WASM build as Wterm's VT parser for fuller terminal emulation (grapheme clusters, full SGR, etc.). Restart open terminal tabs after switching.
experimental.ghosttyScrollbackLimitDesc: Maximum scrollback buffer lines for Ghostty Core (default 10000). Restart open terminal tabs after changing.
experimental.attachPtyRenderModeDesc: Use one shared Xterm instance per tab; switch tabs to attach different PTYs. Split panes still use multiple instances. Xterm.js only.
experimental.attachPtyTabSwitchDwellMsDesc: Milliseconds to stay on a tab before restoring its terminal; quick passes do not attach. Range 0–5000, default 300.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.description: Hardware acceleration, sandbox, transparency, and status bar monitoring
advanced.hardwareAccelerationDesc: On by default; restart the app for full effect
advanced.disableSandboxDesc: When on, renderer sandbox is off; restart the app to apply
advanced.statusBarLiveStats: Live system info in status bar
advanced.statusBarLiveStatsDesc: When off, stops polling CPU/memory to reduce UI updates
advanced.shellContextMenuDesc: Adds “Open with NioZy” to folder and folder-background context menus, opening a new PowerShell tab in that directory
advanced.preserveWindowBoundsDesc: Saves size and position when you close the window; if maximized on close, starts maximized next time

logging.title: Logging
logging.description: Main-process log switch, level, and file path
logging.enabledDesc: No log file is written when disabled
logging.levelDesc: Only writes messages at or above the selected level (DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR)
logging.filePathDesc: Leave empty to use NioZy.log in the application working directory

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Electron accelerator format, e.g. CommandOrControl+T, Ctrl+Shift+C. Clear a field and press keys to record.
shortcuts.globalSingleKeyNotAllowed: Global shortcuts cannot be a single key. Combine with Ctrl, Alt, Shift, or similar.
shortcuts.globalShowAppDesc: If focused, send to background; otherwise show (keeps current page). Current: {{current}}

vault.title: Vault
vault.description: Store secrets encrypted; reference in connections with
vault.encryptionKeyDesc: Default NioZy MD5 ({{hint}}). Place a 32-char key at %USERPROFILE%/.config/NioZy/niozy.key.
vault.keepSecretPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep existing secret
vault.vaultEmpty: Vault is empty; add variables in Settings first

connections.title: Connections
connections.description: Built-in shells and custom command / SSH connections
connections.editCustomDesc: Update the form below to change this saved connection
connections.setDefaultTerminalDesc: Used when creating terminals, shortcuts, and on startup
connections.name: Name

tab.closeTerminalDesc: Close "{{title}}"? The process will end and unsaved output will be lost.
tab.editTitleDesc: Custom label in sidebar and status bar. Empty or default restores "{{defaultTitle}}".

scp.title: SCP transfer — {{title}}
scp.desc: {{user}}@{{host}} · local on the left, remote on the right
scp.descGeneric: Local files on the left, remote server on the right
scp.passwordAuthHint: SCP with password login may require interaction; public key login is recommended
scp.refreshAfterTransferFailed: Upload succeeded but could not refresh the remote list. Click Refresh.

appMetrics.title: App resource usage
appMetrics.description: Per-process working set and CPU usage for this app

toast.loggingEnabled: Logging enabled. Main-process output is written at the selected level.
toast.hardwareAccelerationRestart: Hardware acceleration saved. Quit and restart the app for it to take effect.
toast.disableSandboxRestart: Sandbox setting saved. Quit and restart the app for it to apply.
toast.shellContextMenuFailed: Could not update Explorer context menu. Check that your user can write to the registry.
toast.updateCheckFailed: Could not check for updates. Check your network and try again.
toast.updateDownloadFailed: Failed to download or launch the installer
toast.settingsImportInvalidJson: The selected file is not valid JSON
toast.pomodoroCompleteSubtitle: Focus session complete — keep it up!
toast.scpTransferDisabled: Enable SCP transfer under Settings → SSH first
toast.splitTerminalMax: Each terminal tab can have at most 3 panes
toast.splitTerminalUnknown: Cannot split: missing spawn options to reuse
toast.restartAsAdminUnsupported: Restart as administrator is only available for local PowerShell, CMD, or pwsh tabs
toast.terminalEmulatorRestart: Terminal emulator changed. Restart the app for it to take effect.
toast.ghosttyCoreRestart: Ghostty Core changed. Restart the app for it to take effect.
toast.attachPtyRenderRestart: Attach-PTY render mode changed. Restart the app for it to take effect.

terminal.inactiveOptimized: This tab was optimized: no activity for 5+ minutes, the terminal view was unloaded to save memory. Switch back to restore.
terminal.superPowerSavingIdle: Super power saving: this tab's terminal and PTY are suspended. Switch back to restore.

electron.preloadMissing: Electron preload API not found. Run npm run start instead of opening the Vite URL in a browser.
